title: assembly
description: Articulated-asset intermediate representation. Consumed by blender_assemble.py (visual render) and build_urdf.py (URDF export).

root.description: Base directory for resolving relative mesh paths (the run directory).

robot_name.description: Name of the assembled object; used as the URDF <robot name>.

parent.description: Name of the parent link; null for the root. Transform is relative to the parent.

visual_mesh.description: GLB path (relative to root or absolute) used for high-quality Blender renders.

collision_mesh.description: Simplified OBJ path (relative to root or absolute) used for URDF visual/collision geometry.

origin.description: Pose of this link's pivot relative to its parent.

xyz.description: Pivot position [x, y, z], relative to the parent.

rpy_deg.description: Pivot rotation in degrees, XYZ Euler (roll, pitch, yaw).

scale.description: Pivot scale [x, y, z]. Applied in the Blender assembly; URDF mesh geometry is unscaled.
